wikitext.*:
===Pokémon===
Olivia [[Type expert|specializes]] in using Rock-Type Pokémon. Her {{p|Lycanroc}}, who is in its Midnight form, is seen in every battle against the protagonist and is considered her main partner Pokémon. Lycanroc makes further appearance in Sun and Moon's end credits. It returns in other media such as [[Pokémon Masters EX]]. She is also affiliated with {{p|Nosepass}} and more prominently, {{p|Probopass}}, also having either of the two except for the Grand Trial match in Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon.

A Probopass is often seen around her Jewelry store and provides the player with directions to her to take on the Grand Trial. This Probopass is different from the Nosepass and Probopass that accompany her in battles. A Single Stufful is found among her fake moving toys.

Olivia's Pokémon in battle are all kept in [[Ultra Ball]]s.
